results.title: Risk Data Scientist at Regions Bank | Jeremy
highlights:
Risk Data Scientist at Regions Bank | Jeremy
...
# Risk Data Scientist
...
Hoover, ALCharlotte, NCAtlanta, TXOn-siteSeniorStaffData ScienceML / AI
...
Senior/Staff data scientist role mentoring junior team members and building predictive and prescriptive algorithms for risk management across a major financial institution.
...
Python Java Spark PyTorch Kafka MATLAB TensorFlow Scala Snowflake R Hadoop Ruby Hive Keras CI/CD SQL AI Statistical Analysis Tableau Power BI Big Data Data Mining Predictive Modeling
...
### Job Description:
...
At Regions, the Risk Data Scientist researches, models, implements, and validates algorithms (predictive and prescriptive) to analyze diverse sources of data to achieve targeted outcomes.
...
The position at this level works with multiple teams of data scientists, analysts, and visualization experts and mentors junior risk data scientists as well as independently contributes to solving complex business problems and enabling effective risk management. Additionally, the position at this level requires effective leadership and project management skills as well as in-depth knowledge in quantitative analytical methods, data management, visualization, and programming skills suitable to drive data-driven decisions.
...
- Mentors and guides
...
risk data scientists
...
- Carefully leverages data science, including advanced quantitative solutions, models, tools, and analysis to evaluate and provide solutions to complex business problems and effectively manage a wide spectrum of risks to the company
...
- Uses Big Data tools (e.g. Hadoop, Spark, H2O, CDSW, Domino Labs, etc.) to build data analytics solutions
...
- Builds machine learning and Artificial Intelligence (AI) models from development through testing and validation
...
- Designs rich data visualizations to communicate complex ideas to business leaders and executives
...
- Works on all phases of model lifecycle, including research, data collection, model development and variable selection, model implementation and testing, model documentation, and ongoing monitoring of model to ensure it is working as intended; shepherds the model through the model validation process
...
- Two (2) years of hands-on experience with Big Data technologies such as Hadoop, Hive, Impala, Spark, or Kafka
- Three (3) years of working experience with statistical and predictive modeling concepts and approaches such as machine learning, clustering and classification techniques, and artificial intelligence
...
- Three (3) years of working programming experience analyzing large, complex, and multi-dimensional datasets using a variety of tools such as SAS, Python, Ruby, R, Matlab, Scala, or Java
...
- Background in banking and/or other financial services
- Experience in Agile Software Development
- May require experience in libraries such as TensorFlow, Pytorch, or Keras
- Knowledge in Google Analytics and/or Adobe Digital

Skills and Competencies
...
- Advanced Structure Query Language (SQL) skills
- Comfortable with both relational databases and Hadoop-based data mining frameworks
- Deep understanding of statistical and predictive modeling concepts, machine learning approaches, clustering and classification techniques, and recommendation and optimization algorithms
- Expertise in analyzing large, complex, multi-dimensional datasets
...
- Proficient in visualization tools like Power Business Intelligencer (BI) and Tableau
...
- Strong business acumen with the ability to communicate with both business and Information Technology (IT) leaders
...
- Strong leadership and project management skills
- Experience with CI/CD environments (Snowflake, Harness, Artifactory, etc.) preferred
- Ability to orchestrate large data pipelines efficiently (Spark, Pyspark, Snowpark)
...
### Location Details
...
Hoover, Alabama

highlights:

...
Define and oversee the complete lifecycle of internal data products leveraging Big Data and advanced analytics to solve business problems across Regions Bank's business units.
...
[![Vercel](https://jeremy-tech-logos.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/devicon/vercel/vercel-original.svg)Vercel](https://tryjeremy.com/skills/vercel)[Agile](https://tryjeremy.com/skills/agile)[Microsoft Office](https://tryjeremy.com/skills/microsoft-office)[Big Data](https://tryjeremy.com/skills/big-data)[Product Management](https://tryjeremy.com/skills/product-management)[Change Management](https://tryjeremy.com/skills/change-management)[Financial Services](https://tryjeremy.com/skills/financial-services)
...
At Regions, the Data Products Partner defines and oversees the development of internal products/solutions that leverage Big Data and advanced analytics to increase the profitability and efficiency for a specific business unit(s) in the Bank. Manages the complete lifecycle of these internal data products from inception, development, assessment of success, and maintenance.
...
* Works with a business unit to identify areas where Big Data and advanced analytics solutions can be leveraged to solve specific business problems
...
* Prioritizes product pipeline and create roadmap of products to be built
...
* Develops business requirements that govern the development of the proposed solution
...
* Identifies applicable data assets required to build the solution
...
* Identifies features to build predictive models that are part of the solution
...
* Participates in the build versus buy decision making process and vendor selection where applicable
...
* Creates success criteria and measurement approach to assess the impact of deployed Data Products
...
* Works with decision scientists to ensure model development strategy is consistent with goals and assisting in the validation of predictive models
...
* Coordinates with Big Data architects to create necessary infrastructure and technology stacks to enable solution development
...
* Oversees the solution acceptance testing process
...
* May participate in industry conferences related to solving financial services problems using advanced analytics/Big Data
...
**Requirements**
...
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Science, Information Systems, Finance, Statistics, or related field and eight (8) years of experience in related data work and interfacing with business stakeholders
...
* Or High School Diploma or GED and twelve (12) years of experience in related data work and interfacing with business stakeholders
...
* Experience working through the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) of software development and liaising with Business and Technology/Data teams leading development of Analytical Software solutions following Agile methodology
...
* Product Management or related experience
...
* Master’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Engineering, Statistics or any other related quantitative field
...
* Financial Services experience
...
* Ability to interpret and ensure compliance with applicable rules, regulations, and industry guidance
...
* Ability to research, analyze data, and derive facts
...
**This position is intended to be onsite, now or in the near future**. Associates will have regular work hours, including full days in the office three or more days a week. The manager will set the work schedule for this position, including in-office expectations. Regions will not provide relocation assistance for this position, and relocation would be at your expense. The locations available for this role are **Birmingham, AL, Atlanta, GA or Charlotte, NC.**

highlights:

# Fraud Data and Analytics Analyst
...
Atlanta, GARemoteEntry LevelMid-LevelData Science
...
Data analyst role focused on fraud detection and financial crimes within Regions Bank's Financial Crimes Data and Analytics team, supporting operational decision-making through data transformation and reporting.
...
## Tech Stack
...
Python Git Spark Snowflake CI/CD SQL Data Pipelines Data Analysis Data Governance Data Visualization Tableau Data Quality Power BI Business Intelligence Fraud Detection Data Transformation Microsoft Excel
...
### Job Description:
...
At Regions, the Data and Analytics Analyst transforms data into a meaningful format for operational and/or decision-making purposes. Focusing on day-to-day deliverables, this role works with senior analysts and managers to gather and interpret data for leaders to make data-driven decisions.
...
- Modifies reports that are valuable, readable, and presentable to stakeholders
...
- Assists in the preparation of visual reports/presentations to present analysis to management
- Interprets, analyzes, and provides insights to teams and managers to determine operational impact, trends, and opportunities
...
- Performs data analysis to help achieve data automation
- Creates and maintains databases to help classify & store information
...
- Completes day-to-day deliverables and ad-hoc data reports to support business needs/projects and answer data related questions
...
- Ensures compliance by performing quality data audits, mining, and management
...
- Monitors data and analytics trends and seeks opportunities for continuous improvement
...
- May offer guidance to junior analysts, ensuring proper training and tools are provided
...
- Partners with the centralized Data Governance team to implement and support data governance and data quality requirements
...
- Master's degree in Business, Computer Science, Information Systems, Finance, Statistics, or related field and two (2) years of experience in a data analytics or related role
- Or, a Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Science, Information Systems, Finance, Statistics, or related field and four (4) years of experience in a data analytics or related role
...
- Experience utilizing analytical software such as Structured Query Language (SQL), Statistical Analysis System (SAS), SAS Enterprise Miner, and applicable Microsoft Office applications
- Working knowledge of business intelligence software (e.g. Tableau, Power BI)
...
- Demonstrated leadership capabilities
- Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Outlook, etc.)
- Strong verbal, written communication, and organizational skills
- Strong work ethic and self-motivation
...
We are seeking two Data and Analytics Analysts to join our Financial Crimes Data and Analytics team.
...
### Preferred Skills
...
- Previous experience in data analytics within the banking or financial services industry
- Fraud‑prevention experience, such as evaluating transactional anomalies, customer‑behavior insights and fraud trends
- Strong experience in data analysis and interpretation, including key performance indicators (KPIs), metrics, and business performance indicators
...
- Demonstrated experience designing dimensional data models (Star and Snowflake schemas) with well-structured fact and dimension tables optimized for reporting
...
- Proficiency in data visualization tools such as Power BI or Tableau, including report development and dashboard design
...
- Experience building and maintaining data pipelines, including data transformation and data cleansing processes
...
- Solid understanding of source systems, data lineage, and data refresh schedules
...
- Hands-on experience with Python, Spark, and Snowflake
- Advanced SQL and data querying skills
- Ability to deploy code to production using Git and CI/CD tools
...
### Location Details
...
Hoover, Alabama

results.title: Regions Financial Corporation AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Regions Financial Corporation has positioned itself as a regional banking leader in AI adoption, with strategic initiatives spanning from customer service automation to risk management and operational efficiency[1]. The Birmingham-based bank has implemented IBM Watson technology to power customer service operations, helping answer over 1.5 million customer calls and 1.4 million banker questions[2]. Under the leadership of Chief Data & Analytics Officer Manav Misra, Regions has developed a comprehensive AI strategy that includes both traditional machine learning applications and newer generative AI capabilities[3]. The bank has reported significant productivity gains from AI implementation, with technology investments driving 20% productivity boosts and contributing to 10% year-over-year revenue growth in 2025[4]. Regions is currently 2.5 years into a core modernization project, deploying new AI-powered platforms and tools while maintaining a strong focus on responsible AI governance and risk management[5].

Experienced Data Scientist and Data Engineer with a solid background in developing scalable solutions, managing data infrastructure, and creating impactful reporting tools. Skilled in building and optimizing data pipelines, developing real-time API integrations, and leveraging the Microsoft Power Platform for process automation and application development. Perform various modeling and analytical techniques like Market-basket Analytics, Text Analytics, Linear Regression, and Support Vector Machine Learning. ...
At Regions, the Software Engineer oversees application development, modification, and maintenance of applications. This position monitors system applications, ensures systems run smoothly, and creates reports and other documentation outlining findings/solutions. This position sits within Regions' Technology department.

- Oversees development and installation of new hardware and software

, and industry

results.title: Senior Data Scientist Jobs Abu Dhabi UAE 2026
highlights:
A leading financial institution in Abu Dhabi, UAE is actively seeking a highly experienced Senior Data Scientist – Corporate Banking to join its expanding Data & AI function. This is a rare, senior-level opportunity that demands the perfect combination of advanced data science expertise — spanning Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Generative AI, MLOps, and statistical modelling — with deep, hands-on domain knowledge of Corporate Banking, Corporate & Investment Banking (CIB), Commercial Banking, CIBG, or CCIB environments. If you are a 7+ year data science professional with a strong banking background and a passion for deploying production-grade AI solutions that reshape how financial institutions operate, this Abu Dhabi opportunity is built for you.
...
Data & AI Ambition: Investing heavily in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Generative AI, and MLOps capabilities to drive operational excellence and client value across Corporate Banking functions
...
The Senior Data Scientist – Corporate Banking in Abu Dhabi is a high-impact, leadership-level role within a leading UAE financial institution’s Data & AI function. You will develop and deploy advanced AI, machine learning, and statistical models to support Corporate Banking growth and operational excellence, design Generative AI solutions to enhance customer experience and decision-making, establish MLOps frameworks for governed model deployment, and lead agile delivery teams through the full data science lifecycle. This role demands genuine depth in both data science methodology and Corporate Banking domain knowledge — covering Treasury, Trade Finance, FX, and Corporate Cash Management — making it one of the most sought-after data science positions in the UAE banking sector in 2026.
...
Generative AI
...
- Contact us
- Develop and deploy advanced Artificial Intelligence, machine learning, and statistical models that directly support Corporate Banking business growth, operational efficiency, and client value creation across the Abu Dhabi financial institution
...
- Design and implement innovative Generative AI solutions tailored to Corporate Banking use cases — enhancing customer experience, automating operational workflows, and improving executive decision-making quality across the institution
...
- Advanced proficiency in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning algorithms, and deep learning frameworks for classification, regression, forecasting, NLP, and recommendation use cases in financial services
...
This Senior Data Scientist – Corporate Banking role represents one of the most strategically significant and technically demanding data science opportunities available in Abu Dhabi’s financial sector in 2026. The hiring institution is a leading UAE financial organization that is making bold, sustained investments in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Generative AI, and MLOps capabilities — with a clear ambition to become the most data-driven Corporate Banking operation in the UAE and broader GCC region. The Data & AI function you will be joining is growing rapidly, working at the forefront of financial AI innovation, and looking for a Senior Data Scientist who can combine deep quantitative expertise with genuine Corporate Banking domain authority to lead transformational change from within.
...
- Senior Data Scientists with Banking DNA: 7+ year data science professionals with deep Corporate Banking, CIB, or Commercial Banking domain expertise and a strong AI and ML delivery track record in the UAE or GCC
...
- AI/ML Leaders in Financial Services: Professionals with production-grade AI, Generative AI, and MLOps experience within regulated banking environments seeking a senior leadership role in Abu Dhabi’s premier financial sector
...
